# Dr. Bhoir Farm & Resort

Dr. Bhoir Farm & Resort is a farmhouse resort located near Kalyan and Badlapur in Maharashtra, India. The resort offers accommodation, private villas, family-friendly experiences, outdoor activities, authentic Maharashtrian cuisine, and event hosting facilities.

## Website

https://drbhoirfarmandresort.com

## Business Type

Farm Resort, Weekend Getaway Resort, Family Resort, Event Venue, Hospitality Business

## Location

Dr. Bhoir Farm & Resort
56/3 B Dahagaon-Manjarli Road
Rayate, Maharashtra 421103
India

## Primary Audience

* Families looking for weekend getaways near Mumbai
* Couples seeking peaceful retreats
* Groups and friends planning outings
* Corporate teams organizing events and retreats
* Travelers looking for farm stays near Kalyan and Badlapur

## Main Services

* Resort Accommodation
* Private Pool Villas
* Group Stays
* Family Getaways
* Outdoor Activities
* Swimming Pool Access
* Authentic Maharashtrian Dining
* Event Hosting
* Celebrations and Gatherings
